Legend

Spouse
Kin
Inferred
Uncertain
About
Nodes = individuals (multiple accessions merged). ♀ = female sovereigns. Inferred edges are deductions; uncertain edges mark ambiguous sources. Baseline provenance defaults to the kings-list source unless an edge/person has curated citations attached.
Method & Confidence
Confidence classes
  • Confirmed (c): explicitly stated relationship in cited sources.
  • Inferred (i): relationship is modeled from supporting facts, but not directly stated as that exact edge.
  • Uncertain (u): sources conflict or remain ambiguous for this exact relationship.
Source grades
  • Grade A: official/primary source with direct claim support.
  • Grade B: strong specialist or secondary source support.
  • Grade C: plausible but limited corroboration; keep under active review.
  • Grade D: contested/weak evidence; do not treat as settled.
For inferred edges, open the relationship card to see node-specific inference logic and verification checklist.
Open full confidence & grade explainer Open inference dossier tracker (edge→file)
Verification flow
  1. Open an inferred relationship edge.
  2. Review pair-specific inference logic and checklist.
  3. Open the pair dossier and source trail before accepting or promoting the claim.
